description: A dark still life showing several fish arranged on and around a white decorative plate against a deep dark background. A large dark fish lies behind the plate, while smaller silvery fish with red-orange markings rest on the plate's surface. The light catches the silvery scales of the fish and the white of the plate, creating dramatic contrast against the surrounding darkness. The brushwork is loose and expressive, capturing the wet, reflective quality of the fish with minimal detail.
